title: Pacific Biosciences (PACB) Revenue Breakdown and Earnings Estimates
text: PacBio registered revenues of $36.0 million in Q2 2024 compared with $47.6 million in the prior-year period, down 24.3% year-over-year and missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 11.2%. Revenue breakdown: Instrument revenue of $14.7 million compared with $29.9 million in the prior-year period with 24 Revio sequencing systems included. Consumables revenue of $17.0 million compared with $13.7 million in the prior-year period. Service and other revenue of $4.3 million compared with $3.9 million in the prior-year period. Net loss for Q2 2024 was $173.3 million, compared to net loss of $69.8 million for Q2 2023, with net loss per share of $0.64 compared to $0.28. Adjusted basis delivery of adjusted loss per share of 20 cents beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 16.7%. Full-year revenue is now expected to be around the low end of the previously guided range of $170 million to $200 million.
